note: Every image the page references. prompt = brand.styleSignature + subjectPrompt. seed 88231 reused across the set.

brand.subjectPrompt: Horizontal logo lockup on a plain flat MID-GRAY background: a glossy ornate golden dragon-head emblem wrapped around a blacksmith anvil on the LEFT, the bold wordmark 'DragonForge' in molten gold on ONE single line to its right. Only that one word, no tagline, no extra icons.
brand.post: fal bg -> imgkit alpha -> brand/logo.png ; imgkit crop box 0,0,0.24,1 -> brand/logo-mark.png

brand.subjectPrompt: A colossal golden dragon coiled around a glowing volcanic blacksmith forge anvil, molten gold and ember sparks erupting upward, obsidian cavern, dramatic god rays, wide cinematic hero composition with generous dark negative space on the left for a title overlay, epic AAA fantasy key art.

hero.subjectPrompt: An immense majestic dragon perched over a molten forge of glowing landing-page screens and golden UI panels, breathing a stream of ember sparks that forge into bright web layouts, obsidian volcanic cavern, towering scale, dramatic ember and gold rim light, floating sparks and smoke, cinematic depth, room for copy on the lower-left, epic AAA fantasy game key art.
hero.post: imgkit webp 1920 -> assets/img/hero.webp ; fal video -> vidkit web/poster -> assets/video/hero.mp4 + hero-poster.jpg

hero.subjectPrompt: Epic 3D fantasy logo title text reading exactly 'DRAGONFORGE' on ONE line, carved from molten gold metal with glowing ember edges and a forged-steel bevel, dragon-scale texture, dramatic rim light, on a plain pure white background, no other objects, perfect spelling.

An adorable yet fierce small golden baby dragon mascot, friendly expressive eyes, glossy gold and jade scales, tiny ember glow at the nostrils, perched and looking toward the viewer, full body, centered, clean plain background, premium 3D collectible mascot quality.

A premium 3D call-to-action button, wide rounded-rectangle filling the frame, rich molten-gold to ember-orange gradient with a glossy top sheen, crisp bright highlight along the top edge, soft golden outer glow, dragon-scale micro-texture, tactile pressable feel, high-end fantasy-game UI. Bold clean white sans-serif text on ONE single line reading exactly 'GET DRAGONFORGE', strong contrast, subtle dark shadow under the text. One continuous gold colour, no stripes, no two-tone, no seam, no emoji, no extra icons. Plain pure white background.

slotCards.subjectPrompt: A trophy bass leaping from teal dawn water in a glowing golden slot-reel emblem, cinematic fishing scene, framed as a luminous collectible game symbol, centered.
A tower of pastel French macarons glowing like a treasure, soft patisserie light but rendered as a luminous golden slot-reel emblem, framed collectible game symbol, centered.
A floating neon SaaS app dashboard with glowing UI cards and a cute mascot, rendered as a luminous golden slot-reel emblem, framed collectible game symbol, centered.
A glowing email-capture VSL play button with rising profit charts and neon tech grid, rendered as a luminous golden slot-reel emblem, framed collectible game symbol, centered.

A radiant cracked golden dragon egg erupting with ember light and the word-free promise of infinite possibility, ultra-premium jackpot WILD slot-reel emblem with the most ornate gold filigree frame, framed collectible game symbol, centered.

icons.iconSetNote: all icons: 'minimal premium emblem icon on a solid pure white background, glossy molten-gold and jade two-tone (#f4c044 / #36c08a), even medium stroke, matching a cohesive fantasy game icon set, no text'. flux ultra on white -> imgkit keyout --trim --pad 36 --size 256.

an ornate empty circular golden dragon medallion / coin seal with filigree border and a blank smooth center (number overlaid in HTML)

accents.subjectPrompt: An ornate golden dragon coiling in an elegant horizontal S-curve, glowing ember outline, isolated on plain background, decorative section-divider accent.

video.prompt: looping idle: ember sparks drift up, dragon breathes faint glowing embers, forge light pulses, smoke rolls slowly, subtle parallax push-in, seamless 5s loop, preserve artwork, no large body movement, no cuts
